fix(build): prevent 0-byte static pages from I/O contention

- Reduce parallel write batch from 300 to 200 to lower I/O pressure
- Add sync repair pass after flush: detects and rewrites 0-byte files
- Log individual write failures with file paths (was only logging count)
- flatContentPlugin: skip copying 0-byte source files to flat paths

Root cause: writeFile uses O_TRUNC which creates 0-byte files before
writing content. Under heavy I/O contention (153K+ parallel writes),
some writes fail after truncation, leaving 0-byte files that Google
indexes as soft-404s.

commit.message:
feat(salary): replace estimates with USTAT 2024 official Ticino data

Replace rough salary estimates with official data from USTAT Ticino
(Rilevazione svizzera della struttura dei salari, cubi_RSS_02, 2024).

Key changes:
- TICINO_SECTOR_MEDIANS: all 16 sectors updated with USTAT p50 data
  by NOGA 2008 sector × position level (junior/mid/senior)
- Ticino discount corrected: was ×0.90 (10% below national), actual
  is ~0.82 (18% below) per USTAT 2024 (CHF 5,393 vs ~6,600 national)
- Min/max range widened: ×0.80/×1.25 (was ×0.85/×1.15) based on
  actual p25/p75 interquartile ratios from USTAT data
- salaryData.ts: all 15 sectors × 4 professions recalibrated to
  match USTAT Ticino figures (generally lower than previous estimates)
- Added NOGA code references per sector for traceability
- Source attribution: USTAT cubi_RSS_02 2024, BFS LSE, Salarium

Notable corrections (sectors most affected):
- Education: was overstated by 20-36% (Ticino education pays less)
- Engineering: junior/mid were 10-18% too high
- Hospitality: senior was overstated by ~29%
- Finance senior: was understated by ~44% (USTAT shows CHF 184k)
- Retail: was understated by 18-37% across all levels

commit.message:
fix: suppress uv hardlink warning with UV_LINK_MODE=copy (#65)

When running as a GitHub Action, the uv cache and target .venv directory
end up on different filesystems (container overlay vs host mount), causing
uv to fail hardlinking and emit a noisy warning on every run. Setting
UV_LINK_MODE=copy tells uv to use copy mode directly, suppressing the
warning.

Resolves the remaining part of #27.

Signed-off-by: Zack Koppert <zkoppert@github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use target disk for scratch on live ISOs with tmpfs /var (#9)

On live-ISO environments /var is backed by tmpfs (~2 GiB), which is far
too small for the multi-gigabyte temporary files that skopeo and
containers/image produce during OCI export. The previous hardcoded
/var/fisherman-tmp path assumed /var was always disk-backed.

Detect the tmpfs case at runtime (statfs TMPFS_MAGIC) and fall back to
a .fisherman-scratch directory on the already-formatted target disk.
A self-bind mount on the scratch directory makes it appear as a mount
point so bootc's empty-rootdir check tolerates it (bootc rejects plain
directories in the target root but allows mount points).

Changes:
- cmd/fisherman/main.go: add isTmpfs() helper, detect tmpfs /var, create
  scratch on target disk with self-bind mount, pass ScratchDir in Options
- internal/install/bootc.go: add ScratchDir field to Options, add
  scratchDir() accessor, replace all hardcoded /var/fisherman-tmp refs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(crawlers): replace naive regex detectLang with trigram-based detection

5 crawlers (Coop, EFG, EOC, LIS, USI) had local detectLang functions using
hand-picked keyword regexes — prone to false positives on mixed-content ATS
pages and misdetection on short text. Replaced all with the shared trigram-
based detectLanguage from detect-language.mjs.

Each crawler preserves its original fallback language:
- Coop, EOC, LIS, USI: fallback 'it' (Italian-dominant portals)
- EFG: fallback 'en' (English-dominant Oracle HCM portal)

This consolidation ensures consistent, accurate language detection across
all 6 dedicated crawlers (SBB was fixed in the previous commit).
